text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 90 

ORG_NPI 

LABEL: Organization NPI Number 

DESCRIPTION: On an institutional claim or encounter record, the National Provider Identifier (NPI) number assigned 
to uniquely identify the institutional provider certified by Medicare to provide services to the 
beneficiary. 

For a non-institutional claim or encounter record, this is the NPI number of the billing provider on the 
claim.
